event.name: IPL 2023 Qualifier 1 — Chennai Super Kings vs Mumbai Indians

context.pre_match_notes: Evening T20 at Chepauk, Chennai. Pre-match weather: 82% humidity, temperature 34°C. Dew forecast: HIGH. CSK won toss and chose to field — standard high-humidity tactic. Dew accumulates from over 12 onward. Batting second team gains structural advantage as ball becomes harder to grip and spin bowling fails. Mumbai batting second.

question: Predict the match direction. What is the primary structural advantage and why does it favour the chasing team?

verified_outcome.score: Mumbai won (DLS method due to rain, but chasing team advantage materialised)
verified_outcome.key_variable: dew_factor — evening T20 high humidity makes ball ungrippable, spin fails, chasing team structural advantage
